title: Rocket Lab USA Inc (RKLB) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Progress
text: Rocket Lab achieved significant financial milestones in Q2 2024. The company reported record revenue of $106 million, representing a 71% year-over-year increase. Launch Services generated $29.4 million while Space Systems contributed $77 million to the top line. The company maintained a strong financial position with cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash, and marketable securities totaling $546.8 million. However, operational cash flow showed pressure, with the company consuming $13 million from operations during the quarter. Rocket Lab's backlog exceeded $1 billion, with $294 million from launch services and $772.6 million from space systems. The company signed 17 new Electron launch contracts year-to-date, valued at $141 million collectively. The Neutron rocket development progressed as the design phase is largely complete with production and qualification activities underway. Management projects between 15-18 Electron launches for the full year. For Q3 2024, the company expects revenue between $100-105 million with gross margins ranging from 25-27% on a GAAP basis.
